# Apex test checklist template

Use this checklist as a starting point when drafting or reviewing a new Apex test class.

- Production class or trigger under test:
- Existing local test pattern to follow:
- Shared test-data helper to reuse:
- Assertions that prove the main business outcome:
- Bulk scenario to cover:
- Error or empty-result path to cover:
- Async or callout behavior to cover:
